faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What is the Performance Analysis Platform?
faq.a1: Our platform is a comprehensive solution for analyzing branch and employee performance, providing smart inspection tools, reports, and analytics.
faq.q2: Can I try the platform for free?
faq.a2: Yes, we offer a 30-day free plan with no credit card required.
faq.a3: Yes, the platform fully supports both Arabic and English.
faq.a4: Sign up for a free account and start immediately, or contact us for a personalized consultation.
faq.a5: Yes, the platform is fully compatible with all mobile and tablet devices.
faq.q6: Can I integrate with my existing systems?
faq.a6: Yes, we provide a comprehensive API and integration services with most accounting and management systems.
